cases.name: cross_sectional_control
cases.sql: SELECT symbol, count(*) AS trades, min(price) AS low, max(price) AS high, sum(size) AS volume FROM trades GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY symbol

cases.name: single_symbol_time_range
cases.sql: SELECT count(*) AS trades, min(price) AS low, max(price) AS high, sum(size) AS volume FROM trades WHERE symbol = 'SYM0000' AND ts >= to_timestamp_nanos(1750000000000000000) AND ts < to_timestamp_nanos(1750000060000000000)
